arts.ttl: How should Flick replace Casado for Barca vs Las Palmas?
arts.sum: Flick has preferred to play Eric in midfield this season and he’ll be hoping for his first minutes since Alaves in October. The midfielder is back to full fitness again and put in a strong showing on his first start of the season against Celta.

Lionel Messi has issued another emotional message to Barcelona fans. The Argentina international is poised to sign a contract extension at Inter Miami in the coming weeks as he aims to stay on track to play at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Despite his rejection of an invitation to attend Barcelona’s 125th anniversary gala this […] The post Lionel Messi ‘honoured’ by Barcelona career appeared first on Football España.

arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona are giving serious consideration to Frenkie de Jong’s sale in the summer of 2025. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have on Thursday provided a fresh…

arts.ttl: Patrik Schick, Harry Kane, Robert Lewandowski and players to score a perfect hat-trick in the Bundesliga
arts.sum: And there have been no fewer than 31 perfect hat-tricks in the Bundesliga since official data collection began back in 1992, starting with Karlsruhe's Sergei Kiriakov in 1993 and including such luminaries as Giovane Élber, Claudio Pizarro, Mario Gómez, Chicharito, Lewandowski, Harry Kane and of course Schick . In a campaign that saw him score a division record 41 league goals for Bayern - including three hat-tricks and one four-goal turn - Lewandowski refused to let the empty stadia of the COVID era stop him and he proved 'perfect' in big wins against Eintracht Frankfurt ( 5-0 ) and then Stuttgart ( 4-0 ).

arts.ttl: Fresh injury concern for Barcelona: Key performer a ‘serious doubt’ to face Las Palmas

arts.ttl: Alex Valle Barcelona recall decision made as on-loan Celtic defender discovers fate
arts.sum: Valle's performances have led Barcelona chiefs to keep an eye on his progress, with Flick having been impressed with his talents in pre-season, though Valle opted to join Celtic in a bid to record 'regular' game time with Alejandro Balde being the first-choice star at the club. Celtic loanee star Alex Valle won't be headed back to Barcelona in the January transfer window, reports in Spain have stated - despite there being fears over a potential early exit at Celtic Park.
